validation.connId: Connection ID must be 3-64 letters, digits, - or _

error.databasePasswordInvalid: Stored database credential cannot be decrypted, please reset the password
error.databaseCsvSingleOnly: CSV export supports one table or one query
error.databaseExportReadOnly: Only read SQL can be exported
error.dataJobNotDownloadable: Database import/export job is not downloadable
error.dataJobFileMissing: Database import/export job file is missing
error.dataJobInterrupted: Database import/export job interrupted by service restart

database.searchPlaceholder: Search name, ID, host or database
database.defaultDatabaseHint: Leave empty to access all databases
database.deleteConfirm: Delete connection {name}? Only connection info is removed.

schema.dropConfirm: Drop database {name}? All tables and data inside will be removed.
schema.name: Database name

table.truncateConfirm: Truncate table {name}? All rows will be removed, structure kept.
table.name: Table name

export.title: Export
export.multiHint: Multiple results selected; only XLSX/SQLite/SQL supported

jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search job ID, file, connection, error
jobs.submitted: Import/export job submitted: {id}. Check it in import/export jobs.

settings.dataJobsDesc: Configure background concurrency and retention for database import/export jobs.

list_schemas_api_databases__conn_id__sch.description: List databases/schemas available through the selected database connection.

create_schema_api_databases__conn_id__sc.description: Create a database/schema on the selected connection. Requires database operate permission.

list_tables_api_databases__conn_id__tabl.description: List tables under the selected connection and database/schema.

create_table_api_databases__conn_id__tab.description: Create a table in the selected database/schema from column definitions.

list_columns_api_databases__conn_id__col.description: List column, primary key, default value, and comment metadata for a table.

table_data_api_databases__conn_id__table.description: Query table rows with pagination, keyword filtering, and single-column ascending or descending sort.

query_database_api_databases__conn_id__q.description: Run one SQL statement. Read-only SQL requires read permission; write SQL requires operate permission.

run_script_api_databases__conn_id__run_s.description: Run multiple SQL statements or a saved script. Requires database operate permission.

create_row_api_databases__conn_id__table.description: Insert one row into the selected table.

update_row_api_databases__conn_id__table.description: Update one row by primary key or row locator values.

delete_row_api_databases__conn_id__table.description: Delete one row by primary key or row locator values.

table_detail_api_databases__conn_id__tab.description: Get column and primary key metadata for a table.

delete_table_api_databases__conn_id__tab.description: Delete the selected table and its data. Requires database operate permission.

alter_table_api_databases__conn_id__tabl.description: Modify column structure for the selected table.

truncate_table_api_databases__conn_id__t.description: Remove all rows from the selected table while keeping its structure.

alter_schema_api_databases__conn_id__sch.description: Update options such as charset or collation for a database/schema.

delete_schema_api_databases__conn_id__sc.description: Delete the selected database/schema and all objects inside it.

submit_export_api_databases__conn_id__ex.description: Submit an asynchronous database export job for tables, query results, or multiple query results.

submit_import_api_databases__conn_id__im.description: Upload a file and submit an asynchronous database import job. Supports CSV, XLSX, SQLite, and SQL.

list_database_transfer_jobs_api_database.description: Page through database import/export jobs with keyword, connection, kind, status, creator, and created-at sorting filters.

database_transfer_job_download_count_api.description: Count completed but undownloaded database export jobs for the current user, optionally scoped to a database connection.

get_database_transfer_job_api_database_t.description: Get status, file, row count, and expiration details for one database import/export job.

delete_database_transfer_job_api_databas.description: Delete one database import/export job and its file.

download_database_transfer_job_api_datab.description: Download a completed database export file. After the stream finishes, the file is cleaned up and marked as downloaded.

common.database: Database/schema name. Leave empty to use the connection default or current connection scope.
common.name: Database/schema name.
common.status: Job status: pending, running, success, or failed.
common.created_by: Creator filter: me for yourself, others for other users.
common.sort_order: Created-at sort order: ascend or descend.
common.include_total: Whether to return an exact total. Set false on large tables to skip COUNT(*) for faster first paint.
common.mode: Import mode: append, overwrite, or upsert.
common.create_table: Whether to create the target table during import.

property.total_exact: Whether total is an exact count.
